name: The Sherwin-Williams Company
description: The Sherwin-Williams Company is a global leader in the manufacture, development, distribution, and sale of paint, coatings, and related products to professional, industrial, commercial, and retail customers. Founded in 1866 and headquartered in Cleveland, Ohio, the company operates through a vast network of branded stores and facilities. Sherwin-Williams provides innovative coating solutions for architectural, automotive, and industrial applications, maintaining a strong reputation for quality and color expertise. With a commitment to sustainability and performance, the company continues to expand its international footprint while serving a diverse range of markets across the globe.
